center.name: 馬榮火山
center.summary: 馬榮火山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Luzon island thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas like Mount Pulag National Park, Mount Polis, Mounts Banahaw–San Cristobal Protected Landscape, Mount Isarog, Mount Mayon, Mount Bulusan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas like Mount Pulag National Park, Mount Polis, Mounts Banahaw–San Cristobal Protected Landscape, Mount Isarog, Mount Mayon, Mount Bulusan
